sitwrap.description: Situation report / summary of current state

levels.1: One to two sentences. High level. Everything is fine or here is the one thing.
levels.2: Short paragraph. Key highlights across all active agents and projects.
levels.3: Full summary. Agent status, pending approvals, recent activity, anything requiring attention.
levels.4: Deep dive. Everything. Full activity log, all pending items, project health across all three products, any anomalies.

stand down.description: End session. Trigger closeout procedure. All agents gracefully shut down.

agent-naming.description: Convention for agent IDs: {project}-{role}{number}. Examples: myapp-dev1, backend-agent1, docs-writer1. Used in sidecar startup and Slack commands (!myapp-dev1 <prompt>).
